title: About
subtitle: Open-source decentralized airline management game on Nostr.

nostr.title: Decentralized on Nostr
nostr.desc: All game state lives on the Nostr protocol — no central database, no single point of failure. Your airline is yours.

realtime.title: Real-Time Aviation Sim
realtime.desc: Flights resolve in real-world time. A 7-hour transatlantic route takes 7 real hours. Manage your fleet like a live ops dashboard.

bitcoin.title: Bitcoin & Lightning
bitcoin.desc: Earn real sats through play-to-earn prize pools and Zaps. Trade airline stock slots peer-to-peer on the Lightning Network.

acarsDesc: ACARS (Aircraft Communication Addressing and Relay System) is a fully open-source, decentralized airline management MMO built on the Nostr protocol.
